name: Spa Buttermilk Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form.
2. Slowly add fructose to the beaten egg whites and continue beating.
3. Sift together all-purpose flour, whole-wheat flour, salt, and baking soda.
4. Gently fold the sifted dry ingredients into the egg white mixture.
5. Heat buttermilk in a saucepan until bubbles form on the surface (just before it boils at 180 degrees).
6. Add the melted butter to the hot buttermilk.
7. Gently fold the warm buttermilk mixture into the batter, mixing only enough to combine.
8. Spray a skillet or griddle with nonstick vegetable coating.
9. Heat the griddle until ready.
10. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the heated griddle for each pancake.
11. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges are set, then flip and cook the other side until golden brown.
12. Serve with sauteed apples.
From "Great Taste: Healthy Cooking From Canyon Ranch Resort and Spa". Source: San Diego Union Tribune, Nov 3, 1994.
